message:
fix(safety): harden backward passes and reduce_sum_for_broadcast against invalid inputs

ft-kernel-cpu:
- Convert reduce_sum_for_broadcast from returning Vec<f64> to
  Result<Vec<f64>, KernelError>, replacing debug_assert with proper
  error returns for rank mismatches, incompatible broadcast dimensions,
  and gradient-length vs expanded-numel mismatches.
- Add three new tests: reduce_sum_for_broadcast_rejects_rank_mismatch,
  reduce_sum_for_broadcast_rejects_invalid_broadcast_contract, and
  reduce_sum_for_broadcast_rejects_gradient_len_mismatch.

ft-autograd:
- Add bounds checks in Sort backward: validate dim < ndim, guard
  incoming/indices length with ensure_tensor_len, and reject
  out-of-bounds scatter indices before indexing into grad_input.
- Add bounds checks in TopK backward: validate dim < ndim, reject
  k > input_dim_size, guard incoming/indices length with
  ensure_tensor_len, and reject out-of-bounds scatter indices.
- Add tests: tensor_backward_sort_rejects_out_of_bounds_scatter_index,
  tensor_backward_sort_rejects_incoming_gradient_len_mismatch, and
  tensor_backward_topk_rejects_malformed_indices_len.

ft-api:
- Guard cross_entropy_loss against rank-0 logits by checking
  shape.is_empty() before computing last_dim, returning an
  InvalidDimension error instead of underflowing.
- Import AutogradError in tests and add
  session_cross_entropy_loss_rejects_rank0_logits test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
